verification_notes.note: The official BMW 03/2011 technical-data PDF shows that the exact early X3 xDrive28i row is a 2996 cc inline-6 AWD automatic configuration with the 4.714 / 3.143 / 2.106 / 1.667 / 1.285 / 1.000 / 0.839 / 0.667 ratio set, a single published 3.727 final-drive ratio, and 225/60 R17 baseline tires. The official 03/2012 refresh sheet then changes xDrive28i to a 1997 cc four-cylinder state with a 3.385 final drive, so the old 2011-2017 broad row was split instead of preserving one mixed-era mapping.

gear_ratios.notes: The official BMW 04/2014 technical-data PDF lists the full forward gear-ratio set for the exact X3 sDrive20i 8-speed automatic configuration represented by this narrowed row.

final_drive_rear.notes: The official BMW 04/2014 technical-data PDF lists 3.385 as the final-drive ratio for the exact X3 sDrive20i 8-speed automatic configuration represented by this narrowed row.

default.notes: The official BMW 04/2014 technical-data PDF lists 225/60 R17 as the baseline tire for the exact X3 sDrive20i 8-speed automatic configuration represented by this narrowed row.

options.notes: The official BMW 04/2014 technical-data PDF lists 225/60 R17 as the baseline tire for the exact X3 sDrive20i 8-speed automatic configuration represented by this narrowed row.
options.name: Standard 17"

verification_notes.note: The official BMW 04/2014 facelift technical-data PDF establishes the exact X3 sDrive20i automatic row: RWD, 8-speed automatic with Steptronic, forward ratios 4.714 / 3.143 / 2.106 / 1.667 / 1.285 / 1.000 / 0.839 / 0.667, rear final drive 3.385, and 225/60 R17 baseline tires.

unresolved.item: BMW X3 sDrive20i exact optional wheel/tire matrix for the narrowed 2014 row
unresolved.reason: The checked official BMW technical-data sheet closes the baseline fitment for this exact row, but it does not prove one exact optional wheel/tire matrix.
